content: Legacy PHP directory detection heuristics: A directory is legacy (non-PSR-4) if it matches common pre-PSR-4 naming patterns AND is not registered as a PSR-4 namespace prefix in composer.json. Target directories: classes/ (CodeIgniter, Drupal legacy), lib/ (PEAR style, older frameworks), modules/ (Drupal/Joomla modules), src/ without a namespace prefix in psr-4. Detection algorithm: 1) Read autoload.psr-4 prefixes and their mapped directories. 2) Collect all directories covered by psr-4 mapping. 3) Scan project root for directories matching LEGACY_DIRS pattern. 4) If directory exists AND is not covered by any psr-4 mapping, emit warning. Also: autoload.classmap entries and autoload.files entries identify non-PSR-4 registered files.
